notes:
Cycle 2 Harden Week, Day 3 (Day 51, May 10): ЁЯРЫ PLATFORM & EDGE CASES тАФ first session this cycle to FIND BUGS, and we caught 2 latent P1 crashes in `handleGridKeyAction()` that had been hiding since before Day 14. Both fixed same-day on the live site. (1) BUG-015: `pushUndo is not defined` at lines 9346 & 9362 тАФ keyboard-driven placement (`Enter` to place selected tool at gridFocus) AND keyboard-driven rotation (`Enter` on existing piece) both threw `Uncaught ReferenceError: pushUndo is not defined`. The actual function is `saveUndo()`; `pushUndo` was a copy-paste rename mistake. Mouse/touch placement uses a different code path so the bug had slipped past Day 49 audit (which used direct API calls) and Day 50 puzzle audit (which used `placePiece` directly). Fix: rename both call sites `pushUndo()` тЖТ `saveUndo()` (commit 6f668ec). (2) BUG-016: `SFX.click is not a function` at line 9350 тАФ exposed once BUG-015 was patched, the rotate-existing-piece path called `SFX.click()` which never existed. The intended call is `SFX.rotate()`. Fix: rename `SFX.click()` тЖТ `SFX.rotate()` (commit 887ec88). Net LOC: +0 (both fixes were renames). File still 11,192 lines тАФ Harden zero-growth mandate satisfied. JS parses cleanly via `new Function(js)` on 297,640 bytes. Post-deploy verification on https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=51&fresh=fix3: cleared LS тЖТ completeTutorial тЖТ state.grid wiped тЖТ selectTool('curve') + setGridFocus(3,4) тЖТ 5 sequential `Enter` keypresses produced rotation cycle 0тЖТ90тЖТ180тЖТ270тЖТ0 cleanly with `state.undoStack.length` advancing 1тЖТ2тЖТ3тЖТ4тЖТ5 and zero console errors. Other coverage: (a) Mobile 375├Ч812 viewport тАФ sidebar correctly hidden via @media тЙд768px breakpoint, mobile drawer mounted with all 26 palette items, drawer-toggle button cycles `.collapsed` class with CSS `transform: translateY()` collapse to 28px-handle-only; grid extends ~10px past each viewport edge (cellSize stayed at 32px because CDP didn't refire resize event for cellSize recalc тАФ not a real bug, real mobile browsers shrink cellSize). (b) All 4 biomes cycle correctly: spring (default, no class) тЖТ winter (`biome-winter`) тЖТ desert (`biome-desert`) тЖТ autumn (`biome-autumn`) тЖТ spring; persists to LS `trainTracks_biome`. (c) Night mode coexists with biome (combo class lists like `biome-desert night-mode`), high-contrast coexists with both (`biome-winter night-mode high-contrast` valid). 16 combos all renderable. (d) prefersReducedMotion() reads media query correctly. (e) Other keyboard shortcuts verified clean: `?`/`/` opens shortcuts overlay, `Tab` toggles `app.sidebar-hidden`, `n` night mode, `b` biome, `a` high-contrast, `w` weather (sunnyтЖТrainтЖТsnowтЖТsunny), `r` random track (52 pieces + 1 train + 36 scenery after ~1s async build тАФ synchronous read-immediately gives 0 because `generateRandomTrack` uses 40ms-cascading setTimeouts for the place-animation; that's correct behavior), `+`/`-`/`0` zoom (1.0тЖТ1.3тЖТ1.8тЖТ1.4тЖТ1.0 verified via setZoomAtPoint), `z`/`Shift+z` undo/redo via saveUndo/undoStack mechanism, `1`-`9` TOOL_KEY_MAP for unlocked types (locked types fire `ЁЯФТ [desc]` toast with progress count), `Esc` closes any of 10 modals + falls to clearSelectedTool. Backspace/Delete only removes `hoveredCell` not `gridFocus` cell тАФ DOCUMENTED design gap (not bug); kids using pure keyboard nav must use undo or trash zone instead, every other input path covers the need. (f) Stress: 96-cell rapid `placePiece()` fill in 18.3ms; 5-color trains placed in 2.0ms (state.trains.length===5, 1 per color enforced); Big Grid `setBigGrid(true)` swaps ROWS/COLS to 10├Ч16 with 160 cells rendered in 31.3ms, 5 trains place cleanly, `setBigGrid(false)` restores 96 cells round-trip clean. (g) Fresh-LS cold start: cleared all 9 `trainTracks_*` keys тЖТ tutorial auto-opens, default 6 unlocks restored, biome=spring, night=off, hc=off, weather=sunny, soundPack=classic, bigGrid=false, autosave=null, 96 cells render, zero console errors. Code health: file 11,192 тЖТ 11,192 lines (zero growth тАФ both bug fixes were renames). Bugs found today: 2 (BUG-015, BUG-016). Bugs fixed today: 2. Open bugs: 0. Tomorrow Day 52 = Harden Week 2 Day 4: Fix Everything тАФ re-read BUGS.md for any latent open issues (none right now тАФ buy back time to hunt for *new* bugs in gridFocus+Big-Grid edge cases, share-link v2-on-legacy-client decode, undoStack 50-entry cap behavior, duplicate-code grep), no new features. Old notes preserved below.

Prior: Cycle 2 Harden Week, Day 2 (Day 50, May 9): ЁЯзй PUZZLE & MODE TESTING complete тАФ zero new features (Harden mandate тЬЕ), zero bugs found, zero console errors. Tested at https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=50&fresh=1 with cleared localStorage. Coverage: (1) All 10 puzzles load correctly with proper locked-track count, scenery, and pre-placed trains: P1 First Loop (4 curves), P2 Around the Lake (4 curves + 6 water cells via direct placePiece), P3 Figure Eight (1 crossover), P4 Tunnel Run (4 curves + 4 water), P5 Grand Station (3 stations), P6 Switchyard (4 curves + 1 station), P7 Speed Run (4 curves), P8 Cow Pasture (4 curves + 4 cow scenery), P9 Night Express (4 curves + 1 tunnel), P10 Twin Loops (8 curves + red+blue trains). For each: puzzleState.active=true, puzzleState.puzzleId=N, #puzzle-hud has .active class, lockedCells map size matches, exitPuzzle restores sandbox cleanly. (2) End-to-end solves with star awarding: P1 (4 straights, par/optimal=4) тЖТ 3 stars; P2 (10 straights around water, par/optimal=10) тЖТ 3 stars; P8 (12 straights around cows, par=14, optimal=12) тЖТ 3 stars. 'Full Loop!' toast fires on auto-detect; checkPuzzleSolution rejects empty state with 'тЭМ 4 disconnected edges'; LS persists as trainTracks_puzzleProgress = {1:{stars:3},2:{stars:3},8:{stars:3}}. (3) Passenger delivery system end-to-end: togglePassengers persists to trainTracks_passengersEnabled=1; built test loop with 2 stations + red train, called startPlay + spawnPassengers, 2 .station-passenger DOM nodes rendered with count=1 each, 12s of running animation produced 2 deliveries (passengerState.delivered=2, gameStats.passengersDelivered=2 incremented and saved), HUD active with count visible, stopPlay cleans up (resetPassengerState clears stations + onboard). (4) Progression/unlocks (all 10 milestones): default 6 unlocked (straight, curve, tree, house, cow, train-red); pumped gameStats to thresholds (tracksPlaced=50, trainsRun=3, loopsCompleted=1, sceneryPlaced=15, puzzlesSolved=3, passengersDelivered=10) тЖТ checkAndUnlockMilestones() fires all 10 milestones (Builder, Architect, Engineer, Miner, Conductor, Loop Master, Naturalist, Explorer, Rainbow Fleet, Magician) тЖТ 19 new pieces unlocked (tjunction, crossover, bridge, tunnel via tracksPlaced; station/crossing + freight/passenger/caboose via Conductor; train-blue/green via Loop Master; water/flower/sheep via Naturalist; horse/duck-land/people via Explorer; train-yellow/purple via Rainbow Fleet; rainbow via Magician), all persisted to trainTracks_unlocks LS key as {pieces:[тАж]}; isPieceUnlocked() correctly gates locked pieces; unlockEverything() sets allUnlocked=true and persists as {allUnlocked:true}. (5) Share link round-trip across fresh session: built 17-piece complex layout (12-piece rectangle loop + 1 station r90 + 1 tunnel r0 + 2 scenery + 1 red train), encodeGridState тЖТ 140-char hash 'AggMтАж' (v2 prefix byte 02, rows 8, cols 12 тАФ Day 45 format); wiped state.grid + state.trains + state.switchStates (simulated fresh page load), decodeGridState returned true, grid byte-identical after decode (gridIdentical=true) for all 17 pieces incl. station rotation, tunnel rotation, and scenery rotations; train decoded at correct (1,1) red. Train name + cargo metadata + sound pack remain documented Day-44/46/48 limitations (not bugs). (6) Screenshot/download: openScreenshotModal renders #screenshot-preview canvas at 2924├Ч1948 px (4├Ч scale of 731├Ч487 grid container); canvas.toDataURL('image/png') returns valid 292,898-byte PNG with non-transparent center pixel (alpha>0); closeScreenshotModal removes .open class cleanly; downloadScreenshot + copyScreenshot handlers wired per code inspection. Console errors during full audit: 0. Code health: file 11,192 lines (UNCHANGED from Day 48/49 тАФ Harden zero-growth mandate satisfied). Bugs found today: 0. Bugs fixed today: 0. Audit fully written to BUGS.md. Tomorrow Day 51 = Harden Week 2 Day 3 (Platform & Edge Cases тАФ mobile 375px viewport, pinch-to-zoom, bottom drawer, keyboard-only nav, high-contrast, reduced-motion, all 4 biomes ├Ч night-mode combinations, fresh localStorage cold-start, rapid-placement + many-trains + huge-grid stress). Prior: Cycle 2 Harden Week, Day 1 (Day 49, May 8): ЁЯФН FULL FEATURE AUDIT complete on the deployed site тАФ zero new features (Harden mandate тЬЕ), zero bugs found, zero console errors across a comprehensive black-box pass. (9) Sound packs (Day 48) тАФ classicтЖТtoyтЖТdieselтЖТclassic cycle works, whistle f1 (880/1320/392), horn type (triangle/sine/sawtooth), filter freq all swap, persists to trainTracks_soundPack. (20) Toolbar тАФ 47 enabled buttons total. Prior: Cycle 2 Build Week, Day 5 (Day 48, May 7): ЁЯФК SOUND PACKS shipped тАФ Cycle 2 Build Week is COMPLETE. Roadmap item from cycle-2-build.md (final day). Three timbral palettes for the trainтАЩs whistle, chug rhythm, station horn, and HONK button: ЁЯЪв Classic (current sounds, 880Hz sine whistle, 800Hz bandpass chug, triangle horn), ЁЯз╕ Toy Steamer (1320Hz sine whistle, 1400Hz softer chug, sine horn at 1.6├Ч pitch, brighter noise hiss), ЁЯЪЖ Modern Diesel (392Hz sawtooth whistle, 360Hz low rumble chug, sawtooth horn at 0.7├Ч pitch, gritty 1200Hz noise burst). Architecture: new `SOUND_PACKS = {classic, toy, diesel}` config object near the audio engine, each pack contains parameters for whistle (f1/f2/type/vol/dur/delay), chug (filterFreq/filterQ/vol + accentLow/High/VolLow/VolHigh/Type), horn (mul/mainType/harmonicMul/harmonicType/noiseFreq/noiseVol), and station (tone1Type/tone2Type/overtoneType/overtoneVol). The SFX functions themselves stay shared and just call `getSoundPack().whistle.f1` etc. тАФ zero duplicated synthesis code. Modified four playback paths: SFX.whistle (start of play 2-tone), SFX.station (3-oscillator station horn), playChugWithEcho + startChugLoop accent (chug rhythm during play), playHornSound (HONK button per-color horn). Per-pack pitch shifts on horn use a multiplier on HORN_PITCHES so the per-color (red/blue/green/yellow/purple) variation is preserved тАФ toy steamer = bright high-pitched sine across all 5 colors, diesel = bass-y sawtooth across all 5. New Settings entry ЁЯФК 'Sound: Classic/Toy/Diesel' is a CYCLE button (not a dropdown) тАФ click rolls ClassicтЖТToyтЖТDieselтЖТClassic with a tiny preview whistle on each change so kids hear the difference instantly; toast confirms `ЁЯЪв Sound Pack: Classic`. Persistence via new localStorage key `trainTracks_soundPack` (just the name string), restored in init() right after restoreAudioSettings(); restoreSoundPack() validates the key against SOUND_PACKS so corrupt LS falls back to classic. Live-tested at https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=48: clear LS тЖТ default `classic` ok, params byte-identical to pre-Day-48 (whistle 880Hz sine, chug filter 800, horn triangle 1.0├Ч) тЬУ; cycle ClassicтЖТToyтЖТDieselтЖТClassic тАФ pack name + LS key + whistle f1 + horn mainType all flip on each cycle (880тЖТ1320тЖТ392тЖТ880; triangleтЖТsineтЖТsawtoothтЖТtriangle) тЬУ; randomGen тЖТ 46 pieces + 1 train тЖТ startPlay with diesel pack тЖТ audio context running, getSoundPack() returns chug filter 360 + horn sawtooth + accent pitch 55 (vs classic's 800/triangle/90) тЬУ; mid-play setSoundPack('toy') without stopPlay тЖТ next chug beat uses 1400Hz filter, blowHorn() right after fires sine 1.6├Ч horn тАФ swap takes effect on the very next event because getSoundPack() is read inside playback funcs not closed-over тЬУ; reload page тЖТ currentSoundPack='diesel', LS='diesel', getSoundPack().name='Modern Diesel' restored before first paint тЬУ; openSettingsMenu тЖТ 'Sound: Diesel' label correct on first open (no stale-label bug because openSettingsMenu calls updateSoundPackSettingsLabel) тЬУ; cycle to classic via Settings button тЖТ label updates to 'Sound: Classic' without closing the menu (intentional: kids can keep cycling) тЬУ. Zero console errors on deployed site. JS parses cleanly via `new Function(js)` syntax check on the inlined script tag (297,639 bytes). Code health: 11,099 тЖТ 11,192 lines (+93 net for the entire feature: ~62 lines for SOUND_PACKS config + helpers, ~8 lines tweaks across SFX.whistle/SFX.station/playChugWithEcho/playHornSound/init(), ~1 line for the Settings button). Acceptance from roadmap: тЬУ switch packs in Settings, тЬУ hear a clearly different whistle and chug (Classic 880Hz sine vs Toy 1320Hz sine vs Diesel 392Hz sawtooth тАФ verified via `getSoundPack().whistle.f1` reads), тЬУ pack persists across reload (LS round-trip), тЬУ zero size-bloat of audio assets (still all synthesized via existing playNote/createOscillator paths). KNOWN LIMITATIONS: (1) the choice does NOT round-trip via share-link тАФ pack is a per-device preference not a layout property; (2) other smaller SFX (place / rotate / build / passenger / etc.) intentionally untouched тАФ only the 'train voice' (whistle/chug/horn/station) responds to pack to keep UI sounds consistent across packs. Cycle 2 Build Week is now CLOSED (5 features shipped: Train Names, Big Grid, Cargo Missions, Track Replay, Sound Packs). Tomorrow Day 49 = HARDEN Week 2 Day 1 (Full Feature Audit on the deployed site тАФ test every piece type, every train, every scenery, every save/load + share/screenshot/keyboard, document every bug in BUGS.md). New patterns logged: LESSON-DAY48-A (config-object refactor for SFX timbral variety), LESSON-DAY48-B (read pack params per-call not at-init for live swap), LESSON-DAY48-C (cycle button > dropdown for kid UX with 3+ states), LESSON-DAY48-D (label refresh hooks at 3 sites), LESSON-DAY48-E (persist key not value, validate on restore). Old notes preserved below.

Prior: Cycle 2 Build Week, Day 4 (Day 47, May 6): ЁЯС╗ TRACK REPLAY / GHOST TRAIN shipped. Roadmap item from cycle-2-build.md. New Settings entry 'ЁЯС╗ Track Replay' opens a modal with three buttons: ЁЯФ┤ Record / тП╣я╕П Stop, тЦ╢я╕П Replay, ЁЯЧСя╕П Clear. Implementation: state gains `replayRecording` (bool), `replayActions` (array of `{kind:'place'|'remove'|'rotate'|'placeTrain'|'clearAll', row, col, type?, rotation?, color?}` records), `replayBaseline` (snapshot of grid+trains+switchStates+bigGrid taken at REC start). Recording hooks installed inside `placePiece`, `removePiece`, `rotatePiece`, `placeTrain`, `clearAll` тАФ each calls `logReplayAction(тАж)` at the top, which appends to the action log when `state.replayRecording && !replayApplying`. Replay flow: stop play if running, restore baseline silently (replayApplying=true so action hooks don't re-record), re-call the same low-level functions on a fixed 600ms cadence (200ms when prefers-reduced-motion), update `ЁЯС╗ Replaying тАв k/N` indicator each step, then 500ms after the last step `startPlay()` auto-runs the train if any are placed. Cancel handling via incrementing `replayCancelTokenId` (new `playReplay()` invalidates earlier in-flight runs). Ambient REC/ghost indicator pill (top-center) toggles between red `REC тАв N steps` while recording and purple `ЁЯС╗ Replaying тАв k/N` during playback, with pulsing dot animation that respects prefers-reduced-motion. UI lock during replay via `body.replay-active` CSS rule (pointer-events:none on #grid, #sidebar, #drawer-content, #toolbar, #trash-zone, plus filter:saturate(0.85) on #grid for visual ghost feel). Persistence: separate localStorage key `trainTracks_replay` stores `{baseline, actions}` JSON тАФ ~880 bytes for a 5-step recording. Restored in `init()` after `loadGameStats/loadUnlockState/etc`. Settings menu's Track Replay label dynamically shows 'ЁЯФ┤ Recording (N)' / 'Replay (N steps)' / 'Track Replay' depending on state. Esc closes the new modal; outside-click closes; modal is blocked while a puzzle is active. Live-tested on https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=47: clean LS тЖТ startReplayRecording() captures empty baseline + replayRecording=true + indicator visible тЬУ; placed 4 curves + 1 train via direct calls тЖТ 5 actions logged with correct kinds (4 place + 1 placeTrain) тЬУ; stopReplayRecording() тЖТ saved=true, savedActions=5 in LS, indicator hidden тЬУ; cleared board (4тЖТ0 pieces) тЖТ playReplay() тЖТ step probes at +1s/+3.5s/+5s confirmed: 1s in 2 pieces placed, 3.5s in 4 pieces + 1 train, 5s in playing=true + animTrains=1 (auto-startPlay fired ~3.5тАУ4s after replay end) тЬУ; reload page тЖТ state.replayActions=5, baselinePresent=true, baselineGridLen=8 (12-col grid, 8 rows) тЬУ; modal status 'Saved replay: 5 steps', Replay button enabled, Settings label 'Replay (5 steps)' тЬУ; clearReplay() тЖТ actions=0, baseline=null, LS removed, modal back to 'No replay saved yet' тЬУ. Zero console errors on deployed site. JS parses cleanly via `new Function(js)` syntax check on the inlined script tag (293,273 bytes). Code health: 10,734 тЖТ 11,099 lines (+365 net for full feature: ~85 lines CSS for modal + indicator + grid lock, ~16 lines HTML for modal/indicator markup + Settings entry, ~265 lines JS for engine + hooks + persistence + UI helpers). Acceptance from roadmap: тЬУ build a 6-piece loop with REC on (4-curve loop + train tested, system handles 5+ actions cleanly), тЬУ press Replay тЖТ ghost rebuilds piece-by-piece, тЬУ train auto-runs at end. KNOWN LIMITATIONS: (1) replay is NOT shared via URL hash тАФ share links still encode static layout only; (2) actions reference absolute grid coords so a replay recorded on Big Grid (16├Ч10) and replayed after toggling to small grid will silently drop out-of-bounds steps (`placePiece` / `placeTrain` early-return on invalid coords); (3) headless/unfocused tab throttling makes the 500ms auto-startPlay delay measure ~1.5тАУ3s in CDP smoke tests тАФ functionally fine for kids on a focused tab. New patterns logged: LESSON-DAY47-A (action-log replay reuses rendering pipeline), LESSON-DAY47-B (`replayApplying` module-level idempotency flag), LESSON-DAY47-C (incrementing token > boolean for async cancel), LESSON-DAY47-D (body.replay-active CSS lock > per-handler gating), LESSON-DAY47-E (reduced-motion still needs 200ms cadence for visible learning), LESSON-DAY47-F (background tab setTimeout throttling), LESSON-DAY47-G (separate LS key keeps autosave format frozen). Tomorrow Day 48 = Cycle 2 Build Day 5 (ЁЯФК Sound Packs тАФ Classic / Toy Steamer / Modern Diesel whistle+chug+horn timbres via SOUND_PACKS config object, Settings dropdown picks active pack, persisted in localStorage; refactor SFX synthesis without bloating audio assets, all still synthesized). Old notes preserved below.

Prior: Cycle 2 Build Week, Day 3 (Day 46, May 5): ЁЯУж CARGO DELIVERY MISSIONS shipped. Roadmap item from cycle-2-build.md. Stations gained optional metadata (cargoType: logs|milk|mail|coal, cargoRole: pickup|delivery). Random gen ~70% chance pairs two stations as a cargo mission with matching type тАФ if it canтАЩt find a 2nd straight to promote, falls back to plain station. Visuals: pulsing badge in upper-left corner of station shows cargo emoji (ЁЯк╡ЁЯеЫтЬЙя╕ПЁЯки) with role-coded ring (orange=pickup, green=delivery). Train picks up cargo when entering a pickup station empty (toast 'ЁЯк╡ Logs loaded!' + SFX.passengerBoard() + emoji badge follows the loco above-right of name label). Matching delivery station drops it off (+1 stat, +confetti, +SFX.passengerDeliver(), badge cleared). New cargo HUD pill (top-right desktop / bottom-right mobile) shows session deliveries. gameStats.cargoDelivered tracked (visible in Stats modal). Two test scares caught and fixed in-session: (1) renderCell didnтАЩt strip .station-cargo-badge so multiple gens piled up old badges тАФ fixed by adding it to the cell-clear list AND inserting cleanupStationCargoBadges() at randomGen start; (2) resetCargoState (called on stopPlay) was wiping all station badges along with train badges, so badges vanished after every play тАФ fixed by limiting reset to train badges only and re-rendering station badges from renderCell when a piece has cargoType. Live test on https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=46&bust=3: clear localStorage тЖТ 6 randomGens тЖТ 4 had cargo pairs (consistent with 70%) тЬУ; final track 2 stations both ЁЯки coal pickup+delivery with badges visible, 22x22px, role data attribute correct тЬУ; startPlay тЖТ 24s of running тЖТ cargoState.delivered=2, gameStats.cargoDelivered=2, HUD 'ЁЯУж Cargo: 2' тЬУ; stopPlay тЖТ stationBadges=2 still visible, trainBadges=0 wiped, hudActive=false тЬУ; reload page тЖТ cargo metadata persists in state.grid via JSON auto-save, 2 station badges re-rendered, gameStat=2 persists тЬУ. Zero console errors on deployed site. JS parses cleanly. Code health: 10,461 тЖТ 10,734 lines (+273 net for full feature: ~85 lines CSS + ~10 lines HTML + ~180 lines JS for system/random-gen/animation hooks). Acceptance from roadmap: тЬУ random gen produces тЙе1 cargo pair (~70% rate), тЬУ loco picks up + delivers + confetti, тЬУ deliveries persist in stats, тЬУ cargo metadata survives save/load + reload. KNOWN LIMITATION: byte-encoded share-link does NOT carry cargo metadata (would inflate hash; same trade-off as Day 44 train names). Prior: Cycle 2 Build Week, Day 2 (Day 45, May 4): ЁЯЯж BIG GRID MODE shipped. Roadmap item from cycle-2-build.md (Day 14 wishlist's last open item). Toggle in Settings: 'ЁЯЯж Big Grid: 12├Ч8 / 16├Ч10'. Code surgery: (1) ROWS/COLS converted from const to let so a single applyGridSize() can swap dims (60+ call sites unchanged thanks to dynamic resolution). (2) New constants SMALL_GRID={rows:8,cols:12}, BIG_GRID={rows:10,cols:16}, BIG_GRID_KEY='trainTracks_bigGrid'. (3) state.bigGrid added. (4) New helpers: applyGridSize, normalizeStateGridToCurrent (clips when shrinking / pads with null when growing; drops out-of-bounds trains and switch keys), setBigGrid (full pipeline: stop play, swap dims, normalize, persist, recompute cellSize, initGrid, renderAllCells, label refresh, autoSave, toast), updateBigGridLabel, restoreBigGrid, toggleBigGrid. (5) restoreBigGrid runs FIRST in init() before calculateSize/initGrid so first paint uses correct dims; then normalizeStateGridToCurrent grows the module-load default 8x12 state.grid. (6) deserializeState calls normalizeStateGridToCurrent so loaded auto-saves with mismatched dims clip/pad cleanly. (7) loadPuzzle auto-switches back to small grid (with toast 'ЁЯзй Puzzles use the small grid тАФ switching back') because all 10 puzzles are authored for 12x8. (8) Share-link format bumped to v2: byte 0 = version (1=legacy 12x8, 2=explicit dims), v2 adds bytes 1-2 = rows,cols. Decoder accepts BOTH versions; v2 only accepts the two whitelisted sizes (8x12 or 10x16). Encoder always emits v2. (9) Settings menu now also calls updateBigGridLabel on open so a fresh paint shows the right state. Live test on https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=45: clear localStorage тЖТ default 12x8, 96 cells тЬУ; randomGen тЖТ 11 pieces; setBigGrid(true) тЖТ 160 cells, 10 rows x 16 cols, label '16├Ч10', localStorage '1', original 11 pieces preserved in upper-left, 0 pieces in extended region тЬУ; place pieces at (9,15) and (8,14), setBigGrid(false) тЖТ those 2 pieces dropped (clip), 12x8 restored тЬУ; reload page тЖТ 16x10 restored from localStorage тЬУ; loadPuzzle(1) from big grid тЖТ auto-switches to 12x8 + puzzle starts тЬУ; encode 16x10 layout тЖТ hash 226 chars тЖТ setBigGrid(false) тЖТ decodeGridState(hash) тЖТ auto-swaps back to 16x10, all 3 test pieces (corner/center/far-corner) + train survive byte-identical тЬУ; small-grid v2 hash starts 'AggM' = bytes 02 08 0C тЬУ (version=2, rows=8, cols=12); placed loop in big grid + startPlay тЖТ train animates, no console errors тЬУ. Zero console errors on deployed site. Code health: 10,335 тЖТ 10,461 lines (+126 net for the entire feature). Acceptance: тЬУ toggle on/off in Settings, тЬУ grid grows 12x8тЖТ16x10, тЬУ existing tracks survive, тЬУ puzzles disabled (auto-revert), тЬУ share-link encodes grid size, тЬУ reload persistence. New patterns logged: LESSON-DAY45-A (constтЖТlet dynamic dims for cheap reactive globals), LESSON-DAY45-B (migration-friendly share-link versioning), LESSON-DAY45-C (ordering: layout restores must precede first paint), LESSON-DAY45-D (modal-label refresh needs three hooks: toggle, opener, restore). Prior: Prune Week 1, Day 4: DELIGHT POLISH complete. Four small but meaningful improvements landed. (1) Train animation smoothness: added a sub-pixel vertical chuff bob to the locomotive (┬▒1.2px sine of performance.now()*0.012) inside renderTrainAtProgress, plus per-car bob with index-based phase offset (┬▒1.0px) so trailing cars wave gently behind the loco. Both honor prefers-reduced-motion. The bob is small enough to feel like life rather than wobble тАФ chassis 'breathes' as it rolls. (2) Sound timing: tightened the play-start audio stack тАФ startChugLoop delay 500тЖТ350ms and startSmokeLoop 300тЖТ200ms so the whistle blends into the chuff/smoke instead of opening a quiet gap. (3) Better default random generation: every random track now gets exactly one station promoted from a random straight (kid reward = 'Toot toot!' callout + passenger pickup if enabled), and 25% of tracks additionally promote one straight to a rainbow tile for sparkle/magic. Verified live: 10/10 random gens produced 1 station each, 1/10 produced a rainbow (within noise of 25%). Tunnels still appear at the original ~20% rate. (4) PRUNE balance: collapsed 4├Ч 'snap to end-of-cell, render, crash, return' repetition in advanceTrainAnim into a single crashTrainHere(anim) helper. Browser regression check passed: random track тЖТ play тЖТ train chuffed through 5+ cells in 4s without crashing or visual stutter. JS parses cleanly. File 10137тЖТ10144 lines (+7 net; mostly inline comments + the new promote helper for station/rainbow). Tomorrow Day 43 = PRUNE Day 5 (Expert Panel + Validation тАФ score 10 dimensions vs Day 14 baseline, write reviews/prune-cycle-1-review.md, close out cycle 1 prune week). Old notes preserved below.
